title: Science + AI Technology: ICSE Class 8 — Force, Light and Electricity
subject: Science

questions.text: A pressure sensor in a robot's foot detects 200 Pa when walking on hard floor. When walking on soft carpet, the same weight spreads over 3× the area. What pressure does the carpet sensor detect?
questions.explanation: P = F/A. Same force, 3× area → P = 200/3 ≈ 66.7 Pa. Robotic pressure sensors use this to detect surface types and adjust gait. Boston Dynamics' robots sense floor type using pressure arrays — exactly your Force and Pressure chapter!
questions.subject: Science
